SEARCH
Package org.apache.pulsar.client.api.v5.schema

Interface SchemaInfo

public interface SchemaInfo
Describes a schema for broker-side schema negotiation and compatibility checks.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    name()
    The name of the schema.
    static SchemaInfo
    of(String name, SchemaType type, byte[] schema, Map<String,String> properties)
    Build a SchemaInfo from its components.
    Map<String,String>
    properties()
    Additional properties associated with the schema.
    byte[]
    schema()
    The raw schema definition bytes (e.g., Avro schema JSON, Protobuf descriptor).
    SchemaType
    type()
    The type of the schema.

  • Method Details

    • name

      String name()
      The name of the schema.
      Returns:
      the schema name

    • type

      SchemaType type()
      The type of the schema.
      Returns:
      the SchemaType indicating the serialization format

    • schema

      byte[] schema()
      The raw schema definition bytes (e.g., Avro schema JSON, Protobuf descriptor).
      Returns:
      the schema definition as a byte array

    • properties

      Map<String,String> properties()
      Additional properties associated with the schema.
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable map of schema property key-value pairs

    • of

      static SchemaInfo of(String name, SchemaType type, byte[] schema, Map<String,String> properties)
      Build a SchemaInfo from its components. Useful for constructing a generic schema from a raw definition (e.g. an Avro/JSON schema document) via Schema.generic(org.apache.pulsar.client.api.v5.schema.SchemaInfo).
      Parameters:
      name - the schema name
      type - the schema type
      schema - the raw schema definition bytes (e.g. Avro schema JSON); may be null
      properties - additional schema properties; may be null
      Returns:
      an immutable SchemaInfo
